notes: Official page: 300W, 3x3 ft coverage; Samsung LM301H EVO diodes rated 3.14 µmol/J each, not stored as fixture efficacy. | Official AC Infinity spec includes max PPFD 1819 µmol/(m²·s); this is PPFD, not fixture PPF, so ppf_umol_s remains blank. User requested: efficacy_umol_j set to 3.14 µmol/J from official AC Infinity Samsung LM301H EVO single-diode efficiency; PPF derived as power_watts × 3.14 and should be treated as derived/optimistic rather than verified fixture PPF.
